description.p: cockpit-scap brings OpenSCAP compliance scanning, profile tailoring, and selective remediation directly into the Cockpit browser console.

ul.li: Host and container image scanning on demand with configurable history retention
Selective Remediation Builder: cherry-pick failing rules, download bash or Ansible scripts, or Apply Now with two-gate confirmation
Profile tailoring editor: enable/disable rules, adjust variables, save and upload XCCDF tailoring files
Activity log: structured audit trail of all privileged actions with systemd journal integration
